sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30513" key="e)/greo" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔγρεο</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔγρετο</orth>, <sense id="n30513.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐγείρω</ref> </xr> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔγρω</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
